Package org.eventb.core.tests.pog

Class DeltaCheckingTest

java.lang.Object
org.eventb.core.tests.BuilderTest
org.eventb.core.tests.EventBTest
org.eventb.core.tests.pog.EventBPOTest
org.eventb.core.tests.pog.DeltaCheckingTest
public class DeltaCheckingTest extends EventBPOTest

    DeltaCheckingTest()
     

  • Method Summary

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    void
    testDelta_00_initalStamp()
    verifies that the intial PO file stamp is generated for PO files of contexts and machines.
    void
    testDelta_01_initCtxPredSet()
    verifies that predicate sets created initially receive the intial PO stamp, where the source is a context.
    void
    testDelta_02_initCtxSequent()
    verifies that sequents created initially receive the intial PO stamp, where the source is a context.
    void
    testDelta_03_initMchPredSet()
    verifies that predicate sets created initially receive the intial PO stamp, where the source is a machine.
    void
    testDelta_04_initMchSequent()
    verifies that sequents created initially receive the intial PO stamp, where the source is a machine.
    void
    testDelta_05_addCtxPredSetAndSeq()
    verifies that predicate sets that are changed by adding a predicate receive an incremented PO stamp, where the source is a context.
    void
    testDelta_06_addMchPredSetAndSeq()
    verifies that predicate sets that are changed by adding a predicate receive an incremented PO stamp, where the source is a machine.
    void
    testDelta_07_chgCtxPredSetAndSeq()
    verifies that predicate sets that are changed by replacing a predicate receive an incremented PO stamp, where the source is a context.
    void
    testDelta_08_chgMchPredSetAndSeq()
    verifies that predicate sets that are changed by replacing a predicate receive an incremented PO stamp, where the source is a machine.
    void
    testDelta_09_delCtxPredSet()
    verifies that the PO file stamp is incremented when a predicate set is deleted, where the source is a context.
    void
    testDelta_10_delMchPredSet()
    verifies that the PO file stamp is incremented when a predicate set is deleted, where the source is a machine.
    void
    testDelta_11_chgAbsCtxPredSet()
    verifies that the PO file stamp is incremented when a predicate set in the abstraction is deleted, where the source is a context.
    void
    testDelta_12_chgAbsMchPredSet()
    verifies that the PO file stamp is incremented when a predicate set in the abstraction is deleted, where the source is a machine.
    void
    testDelta_13_chgManyCtxPredSet()
    verifies that the PO file stamp is incremented when a predicate set changes several times, where the source is a context.
    void
    testDelta_14_noChange()
    verifies that stamps are not changed when the source is unchanged for PO files of contexts and machines.
    void
    testDelta_15_Machine()
    Ensures that the proof obligation file of a machine is modified only when needed.
    void
    testDelta_16_chgIndirectGuard()
    Ensures that modifying the guard of an event changes the stamp for the invariant preservation POs associated to the event.
    void
    testDelta_17_chgIndirectInvariant()
    verifies that stamps of predicate sets and sequents are transitively changed, where the source is a machine.
